title: Criminal Complaints: Mr. Kavin Phongpandecha
text:
Mr. Kavin Phongpandecha and Mr. Wee Kiat Kevin Heng as directors of Freedomverse Company Limited ("FreedomVerse") and signatories to an agreement between Bitazza Company Limited ("Bitazza") and FreedomVerse were deemed the person responsible for the operation of FreedomVerse at the time of the incident. Their orders or actions resulted in FreedomVerse’s offence regarding the digital asset dealer without a license owing to joint providing the product known as "Freedom Card" with Bitazza Company Limited. Accordingly, Mr. Kavin and Mr. Wee Kiat Kevin Heng shall also be liable for the penalties as provided for FreedomVerse’s offence.

Outcome: This case is in the process of inquiry by the inquiry official
relevant_law: 94 in conjunction with 26 and 83 of the Penal Code / DAB Act
name: Mr. Kavin Phongpandecha
